data.title: CUDIS announces second season rewards, 5% of total supply for airdrops
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to official news, CUDIS issued a statement saying that the second season airdrop is coming soon, and the total amount of airdrops is 5% of the total supply. The second season event will introduce a new mechanism to lock up positions and get rewards.

data.title: MCN Global will officially start mining and open trading on June 14, 2025
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News MCN Global announced that it will officially launch mining and open trading on June 14, 2025. According to the official introduction, Web3 Financial Technology Group MCN Global was established in 2024, including McnEx Exchange, McnX AI Trading Ecosystem, MCN Labs Investment Incubation and Mchat Social Platform.
McnEX Exchange Main Ecosystem KOL Flyra Protocol is an AI traffic aggregation platform. Its core feature is to realize value confirmation and traffic realization by combining physical devices with on-chain digital assets. Each device is bound to a unique digital fingerprint (Device ID) to generate an unalterable RWA certificate, thereby ensuring that physical devices provide underlying value support for digital assets.

data.title: AURA rose above 0.16 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 173.6%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Market data shows that AURA has risen above 0.16 USDT and is currently trading at 0.1609 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 173.6%.

data.title: Family Offices Shift Focus to Private Equity and Digital Assets
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, a recent report highlights a significant shift in investment strategies among family offices, with a growing emphasis on private equity and digital assets. The report, released by BNY Wealth, indicates that two-thirds of family offices managing over $1 billion in assets plan to increase their allocation to private equity funds this year, marking a nearly 70% rise from 2024.

In contrast, these institutions have reduced their exposure to public stocks, which now account for only about 19% of their investable assets, a 28% decrease from the previous year. This trend reflects a strategic move to diversify portfolios and reduce reliance on traditional stock investments.

data.title: BlackRock Aims to Lead Global Crypto Asset Management by 2030
data.description: According to Foresight News, BlackRock has announced its ambition to become the world's largest crypto asset management company by 2030. The firm aims to manage assets exceeding $50 billion as part of this goal. This strategic move highlights BlackRock's commitment to expanding its presence in the rapidly growing cryptocurrency sector.

data.title: Who controls Bitcoin? Just 216 entities now hold 30% of supply
data.description:
Over 30% of Bitcoin’s (BTC) circulating supply is now concentrated in the hands of just 216 centralized entities, according to the latest blockchain data from a Gemini and Glassnode report. The trend reflects both expanding institutional adoption and growing custodial centralization in the world’s largest cryptocurrency. The scale of this shift is striking. A decade ago, centralized exchanges collectively held just under 600,000 BTC for their users
source: https://finbold.com/who-controls-bitcoin-just-216-entities-now-hold-30-of-supply/

data.title: Ethereum Price Ready For Massive Gains With BlackRock’s $163.6M ETH Buy
data.description:
BlackRock’s recent purchase of over $163. 6 million in Ethereum, through its Ethereum ETF (ETHA), has caught the attention of the cryptocurrency market. With Ethereum currently priced at around $2,748, the investment raises questions about the potential for significant price movements. As institutional investors show growing interest, Ethereum could be poised for a shift in market […] The post Ethereum Price Ready For Massive Gains With BlackRock’s $163
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/06/12/ethereum-price-ready-for-massive-gains-with-blackrocks-163-6m-eth-buy/

data.title: Binance HODLer Airdrop Launches Defi App (HOME)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Binance HODLer airdrop has now launched the 22nd project – Defi App (HOME). Binance will list HOME at 23:00 on June 12, 2025 (Eastern Time Zone 8), and open trading pairs for USDT, USDC, BNB, FDUSD and TRY, and seed label trading rules apply. The HOME recharge channel will be open in 1 hour.
From 08:00 on June 6, 2025 to 07:59 on June 10, 2025 (Eastern Time Zone 8), users who use BNB to subscribe for guaranteed capital earning (regular and/or current) or on-chain earning products will receive airdrop allocations. HODLer airdrop information is expected to be launched within 5 hours, and the new tokens will be distributed to users' spot wallets at least 1 hour before trading begins.
It is reported that Defi App is an all-in-one decentralized encryption super application.

data.title: A trader spent $66,000 to buy 19.17 million AURA, making a profit of more than $2 million
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, before the sharp rise in AURA prices, a trader spent $66,000 to buy 19.17 million AURA, and then sold 3.06 million AURA at $56,800, while transferring 95,000 AURA to other wallets. Currently, the AURA held by this whale is worth more than $2 million.

data.title: PUNDIAI Airdrop and Trading Competition Launch on Binance Alpha
data.description: Key Takeaways:Binance Alpha users with 237+ points can claim 8 free PUNDIAI tokens.Airdrop claim period starts at 6:00 UTC on June 12, 2025, and lasts 24 hours.Claiming the airdrop costs 15 Alpha points.Binance to launch PUNDIAI trading competition with a 107,000 PUNDIAI prize pool.Binance has announced that PUNDI AI (PUNDIAI) is now featured on its Alpha platform.Eligible users holding at least 237 Binance Alpha Points can claim an airdrop of 8 PUNDIAI tokens starting at 6:00 UTC on June 12, 2025, via the Alpha Events page.Each claim will deduct 15 Alpha Points and must be confirmed within 24 hours. Unclaimed airdrops after this window will be forfeited.In addition, Binance will soon launch a PUNDIAI trading competition with a total prize pool of 107,000 PUNDIAI tokens. Further details on the competition format and eligibility will be released shortly.

data.title: Binance Launches 23rd Exclusive TGE Event Featuring B3K Games ($SGC)
data.description: Key Takeaways:Binance confirms 23rd TGE event featuring B3K Games’ $SGC token.Subscription opens from 4:00 pm to 6:00 pm (UTC+8) on June 13, 2025.Eligible users must participate using Binance Alpha Points.300 million SGC tokens reserved for upcoming promotional events.Binance has announced the launch of its 23rd exclusive TGE (Token Generation Event), featuring B3K Games ($SGC).The subscription window will run from 4:00 pm to 6:00 pm (UTC+8) on June 13, 2025. To participate, users must meet eligibility requirements and use Binance Alpha Points via the designated Alpha Events page.In addition, Binance revealed that 300,000,000 SGC tokens will be allocated for future community events and activities. Specific details for these upcoming initiatives will be announced separately.Further TGE event details, including token allocation and distribution mechanics, will be released soon.

data.title: Tether acquires 31.9% stake in Elemental Altus
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Tether acquires strategic equity in Elemental Altus, a Canada-based listed gold royalty company, with a strategy to integrate long-term stable assets such as gold and Bitcoin into its ecosystem. Tether acquired 78,421,780 common shares of Elemental, accounting for approximately 31.9% of Elemental's issued and outstanding shares. The transaction was completed overseas through a private agreement.

data.title: SEC Blocks DeFi Corp’s $1B Solana Buying Spree
data.description:
Key Points: DeFi Development Corp has withdrawn its S-3 registration filing with the US SEC after the agency said the company was not eligible to file the form. The Nasdaq-listed firm disclosed on Wednesday that it had failed to include a management report on internal control over financial reporting, a requirement for Form S-3 eligibility.
source: https://coincu.com/342844-sec-blocks-defi-corps-1b-solana-buying-spree

data.title: A certain address bought 18.9 million AURA at a low price yesterday, with a return rate of 26 times
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to monitoring by The Data Nerd, a certain address spent US$63,800 to buy 18.9 million AURA yesterday, and then sold 3 million AURA for US$57,000. It currently still holds 15.9 million AURA (approximately US$1.7 million), with a return on investment of 26 times.
